root_text.sn23.34:1.3: “sādhu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena dhammaṁ desetu, yamahaṁ bhagavato dhammaṁ sutvā eko vūpakaṭṭho appamatto ātāpī pahitatto vihareyyan”ti.
root_text.sn23.34:2.1: “Yo kho, rādha, nirodhadhammo; tatra te chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo.
root_text.sn23.34:2.3: Rūpaṁ kho, rādha, nirodhadhammo; tatra te chando pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn23.34:2.4: vedanā nirodhadhammo; tatra te chando pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn23.34:2.5: saññā nirodhadhammo; tatra te chando pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn23.34:2.6: saṅkhārā nirodhadhammo; tatra te chando pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn23.34:2.7: viññāṇaṁ nirodhadhammo; tatra te chando pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn23.34:2.8: yo kho, rādha, nirodhadhammo; tatra te chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo”ti.

translation_text.sn23.34:1.2: Venerable Rādha said to the Buddha:
translation_text.sn23.34:1.3: “Sir, may the Buddha please teach me Dhamma in brief. When I’ve heard it, I’ll live alone, withdrawn, diligent, keen, and resolute.”
translation_text.sn23.34:2.1: “Rādha, you should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for whatever is liable to cease.
translation_text.sn23.34:2.2: And what is liable to cease?
translation_text.sn23.34:2.3: Form is liable to cease. You should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for it.
translation_text.sn23.34:2.7: Consciousness is liable to cease. You should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for it.
translation_text.sn23.34:2.8: You should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for whatever is liable to cease.”

variant_text.sn23.34:2.8: ti → bj potthake pana imasmiṁ vagge chattiṁsa suttāni vibhattāni ekekaṁ suttaṁ tīṇi tīṇi katvā, evaṁ
